plugins.name: commit-flow
plugins.description: Language-agnostic commit workflow with conventional commits, pre-commit checks, and intelligent commit splitting

plugins.name: forge-flow
plugins.description: Issue-driven collaborative development for Gitea/Forgejo forges — triage, claim, submit, review, and merge through issues and PRs

plugins.name: release-flow
plugins.description: Semantic versioning and changelog automation powered by git-cliff — bump, tag, and release for any language

plugins.name: move-lang
plugins.description: Move language support — LSP diagnostics, completions, go-to-definition via move-analyzer, and documentation generation

plugins.name: rust-lang
plugins.description: Rust language support — bulk /// and //! doc comment generation and inline doc conventions

plugins.name: ts-lang
plugins.description: TypeScript language support — bulk JSDoc/TSDoc comment generation and inline doc conventions
